title: Container Entity
description: JSON Schema for Container entity in customer workspace. A container represents one logical node that maps to one or more bots/queues at runtime. It wraps another project entity (connection, transformation, validation, data-product, export).

container_id.description: Unique identifier for the container (e.g. conn-a1b2c3d4, xfm-e5f6g7h8)

wrapped_entity_type.description: Entity type of the wrapped project entity

wrapped_entity_id.description: Entity ID of the wrapped project entity (e.g. connection_id, transformation_id)

runtime.description: Optional runtime slice written at deploy time; when present, project is self-describing

bot_ids.description: rstreams bot IDs registered for this container

queue_ids.description: rstreams queue names for this container
